title: noski's tweaks :3
description: Some QoL tweaks, made for SMPs and Crystal PvP.
body:
# Features
### PvP
- Small totem pop, pink pearl
- Short swords, smaller utilities 
- Lower fire & shield, 
- Smaller crosshair
- No explosion particles

### Sound Tweaks
- Huge set of quieter ambience, blocks, and mobs — rain, thunder, pistons, portals, minecarts, and nearly every passive mob.
- No cave sounds for a calmer world.

### QoL
- Applies the top grass texture to every part of the block.
- Unobtrusive rain/snow, shorter grass, fencier fences, golden savanna, HD end flash.
- No pumpkin overlay
- Arabic numbers for enchants
- HD End Flash
- Fully aged crop marker
- Directional hoppers/dispensers, better observers
- Circular sun & moon, ore borders
- Clearer water, whiter snow, brighter nether
- Better font
- Dark mode inventory (+ cute fox!)
- And much more!!!

# Credits
This resource pack includes assets from:
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- ["Inventory Fox" by Ganaka](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/inventory-fox)
- ["Fast Better Grass" by robotkoer](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass)
- ["Small Totem Pop Animation" by voidunit1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pop-animation)
- ["Evanti pink pearl"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/evantii-pink-pearl)

**finally, thank y'all for using my pack!!!**
